summary: Comprehensive testing of Partner Locations feature. All 8 requested features verified working correctly via backend API tests (13/13 passed) and frontend UI tests.

ui_bugs.issue: Create Offer button click sometimes intercepted by modal overlay in Playwright tests - requires force=True

critical_code_review_comments: All partner location APIs working correctly with proper validation
Plan limit enforcement (5 for Starter) working - returns clear error message when limit reached
Location dropdown in Create Offer modal shows all locations with Primary indicator
Add Location button correctly hidden when plan limit reached
seed_data_creation: Created test locations via API and UI for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Partner Locations feature fully implemented and tested. Plan limits: Starter=5, Growth=25, Enterprise=unlimited. All CRUD operations work. Location dropdown in Create Offer modal shows all partner locations with Primary indicator.

partner_locations_tab_shows_plan_info.description: Shows 'Starter Plan' with 'X of 5 locations used' and 'Remaining' count

add_new_location_button_opens_modal.description: Button opens modal when plan limit not reached, hidden when limit reached

partner_can_add_new_location.description: Successfully added locations via API and UI

create_offer_modal_has_location_dropdown.description: Dropdown shows all partner locations with address preview

location_dropdown_shows_primary_indicato.description: Primary location shows '(Primary)' suffix in dropdown

creating_offer_with_location_works.description: API creates offer with location_id, location_name, lat/lng from selected location

plan_limit_enforced.description: Starter plan (5 locations) limit enforced - returns error when trying to add 6th location

mocked_data_note: All partner/location data is MOCKED in backend/server.py in-memory dictionaries (partners_db)
